title: Custom Chest Name
description: Allows you to rename the chest
body:
# Custom Chest Name

Still getting frustrated because you can't find things due to too many chests? Custom Chest Name offers you a solution to this problem: by simply naming your chests, you can quickly find sorted items.

![Chest name displayed to right of the crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b9a00b74abd73968c740f4fb912283571fd4a8a.png)

## How to rename

You only need to open the chest and click on the chest's name to start renaming. You can also rename it by sneaking and right-clicking the chest with a renamed name tag in hand (and it won't be consumed).

![Click the name to rename](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee185cb1d3c0f3a06427af919862bc0ea9a11197.png)

## Compat

When the Jade mod is installed and Tooltips are enabled, Custom Chest Name will automatically disable the Tooltip to the right of the crosshair.

![When installed Jade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58759a9117a83e5a95d20bb9c4e9cfeb0cf79795_0.webp)

## Config

You can change the display mode to one of the following options in the configuration:

- Never
- Always
- Not Default
- Is Crouching
- Is Crouching And Not Default

Neoforge Configuration Screen(The Forge version can only modify the config file)

![Neoforge configuration screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a615f72035ef594812113bfe3c5151052a198d1.png)
